name: key
description: Stable key — required only inside a `CollapseGroup`. Auto-generated otherwise.

name: gradientEnd
description: End-stop color for the `gradient` variant. Defaults to the `--gradient-end` token.

name: shape
description: Border-radius shape. `square` zeroes the radius for tight lists.

name: open
description: Open state. Two-way bindable. Ignored when wrapped by a `CollapseGroup`.

name: disabled
description: Disabled. Header is non-interactive and dimmed.

name: title
description: Header title text. Ignored when `header` snippet is provided.

name: header
description: Header snippet — full control of the title row. Overrides `title`.

name: icon
description: Leading icon, rendered before the title.

name: extra
description: Trailing slot before the caret — counts, badges, meta.

name: ripple
description: Disable the ripple effect on header click.
